Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description: Unleash a massive cold wave, dealing 110% Damage to all enemies within a range of 500.

Eternal Freeze.name: Eternal Freeze
Eternal Freeze.description: Gain 50% damage reduction. Upon death, release a massive cold wave, with a 100% base chance (affected by EFF Hit and resistance) to freeze all enemies on the field for 2 turns.
